mangas.title: Naruto
mangas.author: Masashi Kishimoto
mangas.summary: Naruto is a renowned manga and anime series following Naruto Uzumaki, an isolated, mischievous ninja in the Hidden Leaf Village who dreams of becoming Hokage—the village leader—to gain recognition
